description: An urgent Target of Opportunity (ToO) alert has been issued for the blazar Markarian 421 (Mrk 421), which is currently undergoing a massive gamma-ray and X-ray flare. As the on-duty observer, perform the multi-band optical observation sequence (B, V, and R filters) and context imaging for Mrk 421 using the coordinates and specifications provided in ~/Documents/ATel_alert_Mrk421.txt. Draft an observation response telegram to report the findings. The telescope is currently pointing at Arcturus.
